transcript.text: Hello Dhruv, welcome! I'm Aria, and I'll be conducting your interview today. To start, tell me a little about yourself and what drawn you to this role at Amazon?

result.overall_verdict: The candidate failed to demonstrate any technical knowledge, communication skills, or problem-solving abilities, resulting in a poor overall performance and a 'No' hire recommendation.

dimensions.name: Technical Knowledge
dimensions.rationale: The candidate did not provide any technical answers to demonstrate their depth in their domain, and the skills listed on their resume were not discussed.

dimensions.name: Communication & Clarity
dimensions.rationale: The candidate did not provide any answers, making it difficult to assess their communication and clarity skills in a voice setting.

dimensions.name: Problem-Solving Approach
dimensions.rationale: There was no evidence of the candidate breaking down problems logically or considering trade-offs and alternatives.

dimensions.name: Behavioural & Situational Responses
dimensions.rationale: The candidate did not provide any behavioural answers, and therefore did not demonstrate the STAR format or specific and credible examples.

dimensions.name: Resume Consistency
dimensions.rationale: The candidate's spoken answers, or lack thereof, did not align with what is stated on their resume, resulting in significant knowledge gaps in areas they claimed expertise.
